title: Assistant Project Coordinator
description:
We are looking for energetic individuals as Project Coordinator + Autocad / BIM Drafter who believe strongly in service excellence to join our organization as we build our Sales Team. The self-motivated and results-oriented individual would be required to handle client enquiries relating to our range of products and provide guidance and solutions.

Key Duties and Responsibilities (but are not limited to)

1) Assist Project Team with Tenders and Quotation

- Preparation of Door and Ironmongery Schedule

- Coordination to ensure that bill of quantities is constantly up to date

- Assist in the preparation of project scheduling and mock up requirements

2) Project Coordination with Architect/ Main Contractor / Sub Contractors

- Ensure that project progress is in accordance to timeline and master program

- Coordination of material delivery status, production status and site installation progress

- Coordination for controlled sample and finishes approval

- Work done progress to be updated weekly

3) CAD and BIM Drawings

- Responsible for drafting and preparation of drawings

- Ensure that drawing and proposal drawings are in accordance to specifications or proprietary details.

- Proper filing for construction documents and recording of drawing / production transmittal

Requirements

- Candidates must have a minimum of 2 years of related coordination and drafting experience

- Proficient in MS Office applications

- Candidates must have a minimum of 1 - 2 years relevant experience with autocad

- IT savvy and good in Microsoft Office

- Added advantage with BIM Experience

- Able to work independently in a fast-paced environment

- Able to communicate effectively with various departments

- Good in Microsoft Office, especially PowerPoint and Excel.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified, other applications will be updated to our database for future job opportunities

postedCompany.description:
Weng Meng Singapore (WMSG) is your ultimate partner for all opening-related requirements. Our extensive product range includes high-quality timber and metal door sets, along with a diverse selection of ironmongery options. In addition, we are thrilled to announce the launch of our flooring division, featuring vinyl and engineered hardwood flooring, as well as WPC decking, to complement our comprehensive offerings.

As a direct subsidiary of Weng Meng Industries Sdn Bhd (WMISB), a leading player in the door industry since 1979, we bring over 40 years of expertise to the table. WMISB, our parent company, operates a cutting-edge 20-acre factory in Kuala Langat, boasting a remarkable production capacity of up to 50,000 sets of doors per month.

Having successfully completed prestigious projects in Singapore, including high-end residential condominiums, hotels, and healthcare facilities such as One Balmoral Residences, V on Shenton, and the National Centre for Infectious Diseases, our track record speaks for itself. You can find detailed information in our attached company profile.

Sustainability is a core value at Weng Meng Singapore. We are proud to pioneer innovative technology that enables us to produce carbon net zero door solutions from renewable resources. As the first company in Asia to offer this technology, we are committed to delivering doors that meet your specifications while minimizing carbon emissions and promoting environmental sustainability.
postedCompany.name: WENG MENG (SG) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
